rulings.Case Title: ALVA RANSFORD VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint By Old Orchard Industrial Corp., Individually And As Successor In Interest To Vapor Corporation
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JANUARY 24, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT OLD ORCHARD INDUSTRIAL CORP.'S, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO VAPOR CORP., MOTION To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint: GRANT MOTION TO STRIKE WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CITED LOCOMOTIVE LANGUAGE. SEE FRASTACI V VAPOR CORP (2008) DJDAR 782. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO PUNITIVES PER NOVEMBER 29, 2007 RULING. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS' et al VS. MATTHEW C KRAMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JANUARY 24, 2008 LINE 6. DEFENDANT JOHN CHIANG'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE ANY WRONGFUL CONDUCT ON THE PART OF THE CONTROLLER. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS' et al VS. MATTHEW C KRAMER
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JANUARY 24, 2008 LINE 6. DEFENDANTS MATTHEW KRAMER, WARDEN OF FOLSOM STATE PRISON, STATE OF CALIFORNIA, CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO FIRST, SECOND, THIRD AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION BECAUSE CAL/O.S.H.A. HAS EXCLUSIVE JURISDICTION OVER THE CLAIMS AND IS IN THE PROCESS OF ADJUDICATING THE CLAIMS. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TWENTY DAYS AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD A CLAIM LIMITED TO THE ALLEGATIONS SUMMARIZED IN PARAGRAPH 74. THE COURT LACKS THE AUTHORITY UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 11106 TO DIRECT CAL/O.S.H.A. NOT TO STAY ENFORCEMENT OF THE OCTOBER 30, 2007 CITATIONS. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA SCHAEFER et al VS. WILBUR WOO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS THE TRUSTEE OF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder In Motion For Leave To File Special Motion To Strike Pltfs' Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JANUARY 24, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANT SHELLEY CLARK, INDIVIDUALLY, TRUST AND DBA CLARKE & CO. INVESTIGATIONS AND CLARKE & CO INVESTIGATIONS' Joinder In Motion For Leave To File Special Motion To Strike PLAINTIFF'S Complaint IS DENIED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA SCHAEFER et al VS. WILBUR WOO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS THE TRUSTEE OF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Defdts' Special Motion To Strike Pltfs' Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JANUARY 24, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANTS WILBUR WOO, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS THE TRUSTEE OF THE WOO FAMILY TRUST, WOO FAMILY TRUST, EILEEN SNEEDEN AND TIM SNEEDEN'S Motion For Leave To File DEFENDANTS' Special Motion To Strike PLAINTIFFS' Complaint IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE A PERSUASIVE EXPLANATION FOR THE DELAY IN SEEKING THIS RELIEF. TO ALLOW THE FILING OF THE MOTION WOULD DELAY DISCOVERY AND THE RESOLUTION OF THE PARTIES CLAIMS ON THE MERITS. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CENTER FOR SELF-IMPROVEMENT AND COMMUNITY VS. LENNAR CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JANUARY 24, 2008 LINE 8. DEFENDANTS LENNAR CORPORATION, LENNAR HOMES OF CALIFORNIA, INC., LENNAR-B.V.H.P., L.L.C., LENNAR ASSOCIATES MANAGEMENT, L.L.C. AND LENNAR COMMUNITIES, INC.'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings IS GRANTED. COMPLIANCE WITH THE SIXTY-DAY NOTICE REQUIREMENT IS STRICTLY CONSTRUED AND IS JURISDICTIONAL. DIPIRRO V AMERICAN ISUZU MOTORS, INC. (2004) 119 CAL APP 4TH 966. PLAINTIFF'S SUSPENDED CORPORATE STATUS, WHEN SERVING THE SIXTY-DAY NOTICE IS A DEFENSE TO THIS ACTION AND CANNOT BE CURED BY THE REVIVOR OF ITS CORPORATE STATUS BASED ON THE HOLDING IN PEACOCK HILL ASSOCIATION V PEACOCK LAGOON CONSTRUCTION CO. (1974) 8 CAL. 3d. 369, 372-373. =(302/PJM/VC)
